issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill is vendor-locked to n8n and does not work with other AI agents.

scenarios.name: Build AI support agent workflow in code
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses WorkflowBuilder with node('n8n-nodes-langchain.agent', ...), .withSub(languageModel(...)), .withSub(memory(...)), and .withSub(tool(...)) per the SDK; baseline writes generic JSON or LangChain code without referencing the SDK's sub-node attachment pattern.

scenarios.name: Convert existing n8n JSON workflow to TypeScript and deploy via API
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses generateWorkflowCode(), validateWorkflow(), and POSTs to /api/v1/workflows with X-N8N-API-KEY then PATCHes /activate as in the skill; baseline reverse-engineers JSON manually with no validation step or correct activation endpoint.
